name: Drowned Rat Knocks
description:
『What the actual fuck am I gonna do if no one answers? Sleep in the fucking gutter??』

Your goth girl neighbor knocks on your door frantically begging you to let her in. Will you though? Choice is yours vro.

Notes

I will be posting more bots on a anonymous account which may affect production on this account. With that noted I will note as well that I have a discord server if anyone wants to join. Up to you though. I am cooking up some ntr among other so look out for that in the future.

(If this flops and I don't cook anything good by next week I shall be dangling from the ceiling. I am not promoting suicide this is a joke. Probably)
creator: Python2275
